emails.subject: Lunch
emails.body: Lunch Sara and Mary: Could we get together for lunch sometime soon so you can update me on what has been happening at the office? Let me know which dates work best for you in the next few weeks. My mother in law is coming for a visit next week so can we shoot for sometime the week of November 6th? Look forward to hearing from you. Charles is doing great. Growing like a weed and becoming more interactive with us. While I miss the office routine, I am really enjoying my time away from the office. Carol St. Clair EB 3892 713-853-3989 (Phone) 713-646-3393 (Fax) carol.st.clair@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Lunch
emails.body: Re: Lunch Carol and Mary: I am not available on 12/8. Sara Carol St Clair 11/16/2000 11:22 AM
